specs.description: The first child of the section should be the h1 from the partial
The last child of the section should be the second p tag from the partial
The first root element (h1) should NOT have PartialInfo directly on it
The second root element (p) should also not have PartialInfo
PartialInfo should be attached to the parent Fragment of the h1, which we can check via its parent in the AST
